text.div:
Generated Narrative: OperationDefinition ProviderMemberMatch

URL: [base]/Group/$provider-member-match

Parameters

UseNameScopeCardinalityTypeBindingDocumentation
INMemberBundle1..*Parameters

Contains one or more members with patient demographics and coverage information to be matched against the payer's member records. Each repetition SHALL conform to the MemberBundle slice defined in the Provider $multi-member-match Request profile.

OUTMatchedMembers0..1Group (Member-Provider Treatment Relationship Group)

A Group resource containing members successfully matched and for whom a treatment relationship has been confirmed. This Group can be used with the $davinci-data-export operation to retrieve bulk data.

OUTNonMatchedMembers0..1Group (PDex Member No Match Group)

A Group resource containing members for whom no match could be found in the payer's member records, or for whom the provider's treatment attestation could not be verified or does not meet the payer's requirements.

OUTConsentConstrainedMembers0..1Group (Member Opt-Out Group)

A Group resource containing members who have opted out of data sharing with providers or this specific provider.

The Group resources returned by this operation can be used as input to the $davinci-data-export operation to perform bulk member matching and retrieve the associated bulk member health history data.

name: ProviderMemberMatch
title: PDex Provider-Member-Match Operation
description: Provider-Member-Match Operation enables providers to match patient demographics and coverage information against a payer's member records. The operation returns matched members as a Group resource that can be used with the $davinci-data-export operation for bulk data retrieval. This operation aligns with the Payer-to-Payer Bulk Member Match but is designed for provider-initiated requests.
comment: The Group resources returned by this operation can be used as input to the $davinci-data-export operation to perform bulk member matching and retrieve the associated bulk member health history data.

parameter.name: MemberBundle
parameter.documentation: Contains one or more members with patient demographics and coverage information to be matched against the payer's member records. Each repetition **SHALL** conform to the MemberBundle slice defined in the [Provider $multi-member-match Request](StructureDefinition-provider-parameters-multi-member-match-bundle-in.html) profile.

part.name: MemberPatient
part.documentation: The patient demographics for a member to be matched.

part.name: CoverageToMatch
part.documentation: The member's existing or previous coverage information to match against.

part.name: CoverageToLink
part.documentation: Optional: The member's new coverage information to link to (e.g., during plan transitions).

part.name: Consent
part.documentation: Provider's attestation of an active treatment relationship with the patient. Uses a Consent resource conforming to the [Provider Treatment Attestation Profile](StructureDefinition-provider-treatment-relationship-consent.html). The Consent parameter represents the provider's certification of a treatment relationship under HIPAA TPO provisions.

parameter.name: MatchedMembers
parameter.documentation: A Group resource containing members successfully matched and for whom a treatment relationship has been confirmed. This Group can be used with the $davinci-data-export operation to retrieve bulk data.

parameter.name: NonMatchedMembers
parameter.documentation: A Group resource containing members for whom no match could be found in the payer's member records, or for whom the provider's treatment attestation could not be verified or does not meet the payer's requirements.

parameter.name: ConsentConstrainedMembers
parameter.documentation: A Group resource containing members who have opted out of data sharing with providers or this specific provider.
